title: Home-place seam shift and overlay protection phase
summary: Lane 1 should move visible station payoff off the now-saturated sill seam, then extract one pure station or board render seam from overlay-render.ts before another larger wave lands.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the non-sill home-place payoff handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The station still needs visible payoff, but the sill seam is already at its ceiling.

execution_order.goal: Implement the non-sill home-place payoff pass.
execution_order.why_now: Returns should keep feeling more earned without adding copy or widening the shell.

execution_order.goal: Review the non-sill home-place payoff pass.
execution_order.why_now: The new seam should feel warm and compact, not decorative for its own sake.
overlay-render.ts is still large enough to deserve another targeted reduction.
One focused render split now is cheaper than a broad rewrite later.
The visual shell should stay stable while the file gets safer to extend.

guardrails: Do not add another station row, subtitle, or dashboard seam.
Do not widen the lower sill family further.
Prefer pure render helpers and state-to-view composition extractors.

preferred_surfaces: compact threshold markers that are not the sill
recommended_shape: Use the field-station side gutters between panelRect and contentRect as the new payoff seam.
Add one pure backdrop-accent state helper and one draw helper in overlay-render.ts, then call them before the existing sill accent pass.
Let logged-route progress unlock left brace, right brace, then one tiny center tie, while nursery maturity or extras only enrich that same brace family instead of creating a second motif.
avoid: bed-interior payoff that only reads on the nursery page

main_264_focus.preferred_target: field-station season routes page body inside drawFieldStationOverlay
recommended_shape: Extract the SEASON -> ROUTES page body around the season-wrap strip, route board, atlas strip, and support rows into one pure helper.
Keep drawFieldStationOverlay responsible for shell framing, page-tab switching, expedition rendering, nursery rendering, and accent passes.
Pass only already-derived render state into the new helper and preserve the current rect math and copy budgets on the first split.
avoid: changing the expedition page at the same time
adding another render-to-text seam unless the extraction truly needs it
